name: RPlog_Mandalore_-_Second_Day
title: Mandalore: The Second Day
summary: On the expedition's second day, the xenoarchaeologist Paul Nighman and his companion Shenner meet with the Mandalorians Dane Noth and Urio'kosh to press their case for excavating the planet's ancient sites. Paul presents his research on a datapad and argues the historical value of recovering artifacts, while Urio'kosh remains guarded and the discussion circles the touchy matter of Force-related relics and the influence of the elder Grathix. The talk weighs the divide between pre-Fall and post-Fall Mandalore and the political reputation the warriors must protect before they can make new offworld friends. Paul earns cautious respect by speaking frankly and honoring Mandalorian custom, sealing a tentative understanding with a warrior's handshake. As more parties may join the venture and the stakes grow clearer, Shenner watches warily from the sidelines, and the day ends with the dig's prospects improved but still entangled in Mandalorian politics.
